name: Theme docs and more
description: Styled the cover image to fit in with the responsive design.

name: Honkai Star Rail-inspired redesign
description: Made the grid design look like the character select screen from Honkai Star Rail.
Added animation when hovering an anime list item. (experimental)

name: Accessibility changes and more
description: Made changing the theme easier. (via color-scheme)
Added the --side-logo property: allows the user to change the image next to the main logo
Default font is now system-ui. (before, there was no default)
More default icons to change from.
Fixed overflow on the title when hovering on the list item.
